name: @userland-run/terminal
description: Console — the terminal front-end for userland.run / NanoVM

scripts.sync-sw: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='../sdk/static/nano-sw.js';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'public/nano-sw.js');console.log('nano-sw synced')}else console.log('sibling sdk absent; keeping checked-in nano-sw.js')"
scripts.predev: npm run sync-sw && npm run gen:css
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync-sw && npm run gen:css
